name: aegisrun-foundry
description: Product-grade blueprint for AegisRun Foundry, a multi-tenant remote execution platform with parent workspaces, per-run sandboxes, admin controls, cost tracking, cleanup, and test plans.

interface.shortDescription: Blueprint for a secure remote execution foundry.
interface.longDescription: AegisRun Foundry packages architecture, lifecycle, API, database, TOML, admin, security, cleanup, cost-control, UX, runbook, and test-plan docs for a multi-tenant remote execution platform.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the AegisRun Foundry blueprint to plan, review, or implement a multi-tenant remote execution platform.
